figures.caption: Figure 2: DataClaw operates natively within IM platforms. Users can send natural language requests and receive results directly in the chat thread, while the backend console provides a real-time view of the agent’s reasoning process.
Figure 3: DataClaw’s console UI components include (a) the Sidebar Control Panel, (b) the Channel Config, (c) the Skills Management, (d) System Status and Logs, and (e) the Memory Management.
